name: renova-agent
description: Renova system with virtual desktop, local agent scaffold, renewal index, ontology graph, and lab kit.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check calculator.js && node --check page-agent-bridge.js && python3 -m py_compile server.py scripts/check_repository_safety.py && python3 -m compileall -q renova_core
scripts.lint: python3 -m ruff check renova_core tests server.py scripts/check_repository_safety.py
scripts.format:check: python3 -m ruff format --check renova_core tests server.py scripts/check_repository_safety.py
scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:py
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run security:check && npm run test
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify && npm run verify:web3 && npm run build:pages
scripts.codex:mcp:add: codex mcp add claude-flow -- npx claude-flow@3.25.6 mcp start
